description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its length. The grooves are deep and create a striped pattern, giving the block a distinctive, industrial appearance. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with a dark coloration that contrasts with the lighter, textured top surface. The block appears dense and heavy, likely made from a durable stone such as granite or concrete. Its robust construction suggests it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, possibly for traffic control or pedestrian safety. There are no visible signs of damage, engravings, or significant weathering on the surfaces.
description: A heavy, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid sides. The block has a dark, industrial look and appears built for durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, grooved top surface and the solid, dark front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the parallel grooves across the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the grooved top and solid back face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the deep grooves and the block's thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a traffic or pedestrian barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
